The highlighted continent is Europe. 

Europe consists of countries located on the northern part of the European continent and several islands. Europe is bordered by the Atlantic Ocean to the west and north, the Mediterranean Sea to the south, the Baltic Sea and the North Sea to the north, and Asia to the east. The North Pole is situated in the Arctic Ocean, which partly covers Europe. The North Sea is the second-largest of Europe's seas, situated between the Atlantic and Arctic Oceans, and connects the North Sea, Baltic Sea, and North Atlantic Ocean.<|im_end|><|endoftext|><|endoftext|><|endoftext|><|endoftext|><|endoftext|><|endoftext|><|endoftext|><|endoftext|><|endoftext|><|endoftext|><|endoftext|><|endoftext|><|endoftext|><|endoftext|><|endoftext|><|endoftext|>
